game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
In this award-winning puzzle adventure game, play as the Traveler on a quest to reunite the Peoples of the Tower. Observe, listen, and decipher ancient languages in a fascinating universe inspired by the Myth of Babel.

Winner of Best Indie Game at the 2024 New York Game Awards and nominated multiple times at other ceremonies including The Game Awards and the BAFTA, Chants of Sennaar is a critically-acclaimed puzzle and adventure game developed by Rundisc.

Divided since the dawn of time, the Peoples of the Tower no longer speak to each other, isolated by fear or mistrust. It is said that one day, a Traveler will find the wisdom to break down the walls and restore the balance. Travel the endless steps of a prodigious labyrinth, uncover the truth and unveil the mysteries of this fascinating universe where ancient languages are both the lock and the key.

Inspired by the myth of Babel, discover an enigmatic and vast tower. As the Traveler, delve into a world full of mysteries, where Peoples have grown distant, unable to communicate with each other anymore. Begin your adventure in a prodigious tower inhabited by five distinct Peoples, observe, listen, and strive to mend the bonds of distrust.

With a smart gameplay system, explore and solve various puzzles to uncover the mysteries of five different interconnected languages. Always guided by your trusty notebook, note each symbol, keep track of your surroundings, engage in conversations with people and unravel the meaning of every glyph. Each step will pave your way to the top of the Tower as each word will restore the link between People.

Dive into an enthralling and colorful world full of secrets. Tumble headlong into a beautiful world inspired by impactful European comics authors where every floor of the Tower possesses its own visual identity, supported by distinctive technological levels, architecture and culture. Embark on a poetic and enchanting journey driven by a soul-stirring, lyrical soundtrack, made by Thomas Brunet.
game_info.description: You are the Traveler, exploring a mystical tower inhabited by three ancient Peoples who speak different languages. Your mission is to decipher their unique glyphs by observing context clues, collecting symbols, and matching them to their meanings. Successfully translate all glyphs from each culture to unite the Peoples and reach the top of the Tower. Watch for visual clues, interact with NPCs, and use your notebook to track discoveries!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move the Traveler through the tower
Space: Interact with NPCs and objects to collect glyphs
Z: Open/close your translation notebook to match glyphs with meanings
Shift: Sprint to move faster through the tower

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement mechanics and interaction system. Validates that the player can move around the tower, interact with NPCs and objects, and collect glyphs properly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the player through all accessible areas, interact with every NPC and object encountered, and verify that glyphs are collected and stored correctly in the game state.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully navigates the tower, collects multiple glyphs from different sources, and the game state properly tracks all collected symbols without errors.

TEST_1.expected: Player successfully navigates the tower, collects multiple glyphs from different sources, and the game state properly tracks all collected symbols without errors.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the complete win condition by solving all language puzzles. This implements an optimal strategy to decipher all three languages and reunite the Peoples of the Tower.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Systematically collect all glyphs from each floor, use context clues to deduce correct translations, open the notebook to match glyphs with their meanings, and complete all three language sets to trigger the win condition.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: All glyphs are correctly translated, all three Peoples are united, the player reaches GAME_OVER_WIN state, and a victory message is displayed with final statistics.
